goal: Build a PLC-in-the-loop conveyor station: Isaac Sim conveyor receives pause/resume signals from a Modbus-TCP server (any external PLC or pymodbus mock). The conveyor pauses within ~250ms of a Modbus holding register flipping to 0 and resumes within ~250ms of it returning to non-zero. Validates Phase 6 M2 (modbus_tcp_bridge_attach + diagnose_modbus_bridge).
thoughts: PLC-in-the-loop test: external Modbus-TCP source drives belt state. We use pymodbus mock server (any holding registers will do) to simulate the PLC.
Bridge attaches with rate_hz=10 (100ms poll) — well below the 250ms target reaction time spec.
Test plan: start mock server with HR0=1, attach bridge, verify run state, flip HR0=0 via mock-server callback, observe belt-pause within 250ms via diagnose_modbus_bridge n_register_updates.

Note: function-gate via simulate_traversal_check is N/A — this canonical doesn't deliver cubes; it tests bridge plumbing. verify_pickplace_pipeline is also N/A. Custom validation via diagnose_modbus_bridge.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_conveyor(prim_path="/World/PLCConveyor", position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.78], size=[2.0, 0.4, 0.05], surface_velocity=[0.3, 0, 0])
modbus_tcp_bridge_attach(host="127.0.0.1", port=5021, register_map={"/World/PLCConveyor/run_command": 0, "/World/PLCConveyor/jam_signal": 1, "/World/PLCConveyor/reset": 2, "/World/PLCConveyor/start_button": 3}, rate_hz=10.0, mode="client")
extension_notes: First plumbing-only canonical (no cube delivery). Tests Phase 6 M2 modbus_tcp_bridge primitive end-to-end against a pymodbus mock server. Future expansion: drive surfaceVelocity via run_command, hook PLC-pause to controller's belt-pause callback for real cube-pause test.
failure_modes: Modbus mock server not running on 127.0.0.1:5021 → bridge attach succeeds but diagnose shows alive=false + connect_failed in log
pymodbus not installed → bridge worker fails to start; diagnose log_tail shows ImportError
Wrong register_map → bridge alive but n_register_updates=0 with errors logged
